tau.description: Transition time from location a to location a'

r.description: Reward for being at location a at time t

cap.description: Capacity of location a at time t

code.python: assert all(tau[a][a2] >= 0 for a in range(nA) for a2 in range(nA))
assert all(cap[a][t] >= 0 for a in range(nA) for t in range(nT))

x.description: 1 if flight p departs from location a to location a' at event time t, 0 otherwise

constraints.description: Each flight must make at least one trip.
constraints.formulation: \sum_{a \in A} \sum_{a' \in A} \sum_{t \in T} x_{p,a,a',t} \geq 1 \quad \forall p \in P

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(x[p, a, a2, t] for a in range(nA) for a2 in range(nA) for t in range(nT)) >= 1 for p in range(nP))

constraints.description: The number of departures from each location does not exceed the location capacity at each event time.
constraints.formulation: \sum_{p \in P} \sum_{a' \in A} x_{p,a,a',t} \leq \text{cap}_{a,t} \quad \forall a \in A, t \in T

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(x[p, a, a2, t] for p in range(nP) for a2 in range(nA)) <= cap[a][t] for a in range(nA) for t in range(nT))

objective.description: Maximize total reward: reward at location a at time t accrues when a flight arrives at a at time t (i.e., departed from some a' at time t' where t' + tau[a'][a] = t).
objective.formulation: \max \sum_{p \in P} \sum_{a \in A} \sum_{t \in T} r_{a,t} \left( \sum_{a' \in A} \sum_{t' \in T: t' + \tau_{a,a'} = t} x_{p,a,a',t'} \right)

code.gurobipy: model.setObjective(gp.quicksum(r[a][t] * gp.quicksum(x[p, a, a2, t2] for a2 in range(nA) for t2 in range(nT) if t2 + tau[a][a2] == t) for p in range(nP) for a in range(nA) for t in range(nT)), GRB.MAXIMIZE)
